title: iSol Talent Acquisition Agreement — Bridging Recruiting Gap to UKG
summary: HR presents item 10, an agreement with iSol Talent Acquisition (formerly Applicant Pro) to bridge the recruiting gap until UKG Pro goes live. Indeed recently cut the city's free job postings from unlimited to 3 per month, with 90 vacancies to fill. iSol provides access to Indeed plus 300+ job boards with 2-3 day setup. Councilor Caldwell offers to partner on distributing job openings to local community workforce organizations like Northeast Community Center.
raw_content:
[00:06:33] Have item number 10.
[00:06:35] >> Good afternoon council. Um item 10 is to
[00:06:38] enter an agreement with Isol Talent
[00:06:40] acquisition which used to be called
[00:06:42] applicant pro. Um, and we are looking to
[00:06:45] kind of bridge the gap between now and
[00:06:47] we have when we have our own applicant
[00:06:49] tracking system.
[00:06:51] >> Um, and I'm not sure if you've heard
[00:06:53] >> uh Indeed has kind of
[00:06:56] >> uh
[00:06:57] down a little bit.
[00:06:59] >> So, we used to have unlimited posting.
[00:07:01] We don't. We can only post three jobs a
[00:07:02] month now. Um, which is we have 90
[00:07:05] vacancies that we need to fill. Um, so
[00:07:10] teaming with Isol will help us not

[00:07:25] would help us a advertise but also b

[00:07:50] >> Sure. Um, I work in workforce
[00:07:52] development at [clears throat] Northeast

[00:08:06] right now we're working heavy with New
[00:08:07] York State, the their do um to get our

[00:08:17] of Indeed is the first problem. And then

[00:08:22] um we could put together a list serve of
[00:08:24] local agencies that are working with
[00:08:26] people that are looking for work to try
[00:08:28] to help them get jobs within our city.
[00:08:31] >> Yeah, absolutely.
[00:08:32] >> So if you want, I'll work with you on
[00:08:34] that.
[00:08:34] >> Okay. Yeah, that'd be great.
[00:08:35] >> Okay.
[00:08:35] >> Yeah, I'll take any help I can get.
[00:08:38] >> Thank you.
[00:08:38] >> Any other questions?
[00:08:40] >> Thank you Catwell. Councelor Mock.
[00:08:44] Thank you, [clears throat] Madam
processing_notes: Department of Permits and Development detection is false positive; actual presenting department is Human Resources
